state.description: State is the dashboard lifecycle state for every workspace in the group.

oneOf.description: Workspaces lists watched workspace entries in dashboard recency order.

workspaces.description: Workspaces lists watched workspace entries in dashboard recency order.

DashboardGroup.description: DashboardGroup is one dashboard lifecycle group.

ok.description: OK reports whether the machine-local watchlist was loaded.

resource.description: Resource is the stable UI resource identifier.

summary.description: Summary is the concise human-readable explanation of the loaded dashboard model.

oneOf.description: Groups lists watched workspaces grouped by dashboard lifecycle state.

groups.description: Groups lists watched workspaces grouped by dashboard lifecycle state.

errors.description: Errors lists hard failures that prevented dashboard loading.

DashboardResult.description: DashboardResult is the read-only UI resource for the machine-local dashboard home.

workspace_key.description: WorkspaceKey is the opaque deterministic route key derived from the watched workspace path.

workspace_path.description: WorkspacePath is the canonical watched path from the watchlist record.

watched_at.description: WatchedAt is the timestamp when the workspace first entered the watchlist.

last_seen_at.description: LastSeenAt is the dashboard recency timestamp from the watchlist record.

dashboard_state.description: DashboardState is the read-time dashboard lifecycle state.

invalid_reason.description: InvalidReason refines invalid entries without expanding the dashboard lifecycle state enum.

current_node.description: CurrentNode is the raw harness workflow node for readable status entries.

summary.description: Summary is the compact workspace summary for dashboard rows or cards.

next_actions.description: NextAction lists the most relevant status follow-up steps for readable entries.

warnings.description: Warnings lists non-fatal degraded-state notes for this workspace.

blockers.description: Blockers lists state issues that block ordinary progression for this workspace.

errors.description: Errors lists hard failures for this workspace entry.

artifacts.description: Artifacts points to stable status artifact handles for navigation or display.

DashboardWorkspace.description: DashboardWorkspace is one watched workspace summary for the dashboard home.

path.description: Path identifies the field, section, or artifact path associated with the error.

message.description: Message is the human-readable explanation of the problem.

ErrorDetail.description: ErrorDetail describes one machine-readable validation or execution problem in a command result.

oneOf.description: Command is the suggested command line to run next when the next step is best expressed as a harness command.

command.description: Command is the suggested command line to run next when the next step is best expressed as a harness command.

description.description: Description explains the suggested next step in plain language.

NextAction.description: NextAction describes one concrete follow-up action that the caller should consider after reading a command result.

name.description: Name is the human-readable dimension label.

slot.description: Slot is the stable slot identifier.

instructions.description: Instructions is the reviewer prompt for this slot.

submission_path.description: SubmissionPath is the target path for this slot's submission artifact.

ReviewSlot.description: ReviewSlot describes one surfaced reviewer submission slot.

project_root.description: ProjectRoot is the repository root that anchors surfaced repo-facing paths.

plan_path.description: PlanPath is the active, archived, or last-landed plan path relevant to the current status resolution.

supplements_path.description: SupplementsPath is the companion supplements directory for the current plan package when one exists.

review_round_id.description: ReviewRoundID is the active review round identifier when review is in flight.

review_slots.description: ReviewSlots lists the active round's reviewer-owned slot handles when review is in flight.

ci_record_id.description: CIRecordID is the latest CI evidence record identifier when known.

publish_record_id.description: PublishRecordID is the latest publish evidence record identifier when known.

sync_record_id.description: SyncRecordID is the latest sync evidence record identifier when known.

last_landed_at.description: LastLandedAt is the timestamp of the most recent landed plan.

StatusArtifacts.description: StatusArtifacts lists stable paths or identifiers related to the current status result.

title: Dashboard UI resource
description: Read-only JSON resource returned by the dashboard home API.
